div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: seeds mHash in

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KVCacheBlock
one node in the prefix tree
holds metadata only — no raw KV data

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Identity
mBlockId — int, pool-independent linear ID
mMemoryPoolBlockIndex — row in GPU pool tensor

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Tree Pointers
mPrevBlock — parent in reuse tree
mPrevBlockInSeq — parent in sequence order
mNextBlocks — map of BlockKey → child BlockPtr
block is in the tree iff mPrevBlock != nullptr

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Lifecycle State
mRefCount — active references from sequences
mSchedulingRefCount — scheduler lookahead refs
mIsFull — all tokensPerBlock slots written
mHash — Merkle-chained hash over full prefix path

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Retention Policy
mPriority — 0 to 100, higher = keep longer
mDurationMs — how long priority applies
mExpirationTime — absolute expiry timestamp

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BlockKey
the label on every tree edge
two blocks match iff their full BlockKey matches

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
uniqueTokens
VecUniqueTokens of length tokensPerBlock
the token IDs this block covers

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
loraTaskId
optional LoRA adapter ID
blocks with different loraTaskId never share
each adapter gets its own subtree

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
cacheSaltID
optional tenant or user ID
prevents cross-tenant cache sharing
same tokens + different salt = different block

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
extraKeys
multimodal content hashes — images, video
disables partial matching for this block
requires exact match for reuse

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BlockKeyHasher
hash(blockKey, parentHash)
seeds each block hash with parent hash
creates Merkle chain over prefix history
